goal: Unify battle system to the confirmed two-zone model (zhu_yi/pang_yi) and remove runtime inconsistencies between staged and working states.
constraints: Treat two-zone model as the single source of truth: zhu_yi and pang_yi.
Do not introduce new gameplay systems; only consistency and naming alignment fixes.
Keep changes within battle runtime/UI and task workflow files.
If any mapping cannot be proven, keep behavior and only update inconsistent wording/comments.
deliverables: Aligned SeatId/lane usage across staged and working changes.
Removed or corrected stale three-lane wording in active battle runtime/UI files.
Typecheck and gate checks passing after alignment.
